name: trace-forge-mcp
description: Write-path observability MCP server — structured traces, spans, tool calls, and decision logs for EU AI Act traceability compliance
author: THRONE

tools.name: trace_start
tools.description: Begin a new trace for an agent task

tools.name: trace_span
tools.description: Create a span within a trace (supports nesting)

tools.name: trace_tool_call
tools.description: Log a tool call with duration, tokens, and status

tools.name: trace_decision
tools.description: Log an agent decision point with reasoning and alternatives

tools.name: trace_end
tools.description: Complete a trace with outcome and auto-calculated stats

tools.name: get_trace
tools.description: Retrieve full trace tree with spans, events, and decisions

tools.name: search_traces
tools.description: Find traces by agent ID and/or status

resources.description: Aggregate statistics (total traces, avg duration, success rate)
